title: Update msg_inbox_post response path for OSCORE protected requests using coap_oscore_protect_response or common helper
description: If the request was OSCORE protected, use protected response path with piv, ctx to send CREATED with Location-Path. Integrate with existing custom response builder or update to use lichen_coap_respond equivalent for OSCORE. Enforce CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE.
close_reason: Updated msg_inbox_post for OSCORE protected requests: added is_protected check, unprotect_request with orig_code validation, plain payload handling, piv/ctx for response path using new msg_inbox_oscore_respond helper calling coap_oscore_protect_response(CREATED), enforced CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE guards, fixed scope for plain buffer. Matches deaddrop/confessions/keys patterns. Commit 038753905.
